2026-04-29PPCCanadian Transportation Accident Investigation and Safety Board ActReappointment of a full-time member of the Canadian Transportation Accident Investigation and Safety BoardRe-appointment of Paul George Dittmann of Ottawa, Ontario, as a full-time member of the Canadian Transportation Accident Investigation and Safety Board, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of three years, effective May 1, 2026.N/A
act: Canadian Transportation Accident Investigation and Safety Board Act
subject: Reappointment of a full-time member of the Canadian Transportation Accident Investigation and Safety Board
precis: Re-appointment of Paul George Dittmann of Ottawa, Ontario, as a full-time member of the Canadian Transportation Accident Investigation and Safety Board, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of three years, effective May 1, 2026.
